task_description: Implement 6 expansion modules for the Liu Yao divination system: (1) Dual-Core Hexagram analysis with ying-yao as half use-spirit for special-target/grafted questions, (2) Topological Use-Spirit selection via Wu-Xing class-imagery, star-sha, and Liu-Shen, (3) Hidden Line/Fu-Shen system for when use-spirit is not visible in hexagram, (4) Refined timing (ying-qi) with all 21 standard formulas and speed modifiers, (5) Mindset vs Event hexagram automatic identification, (6) Changed hexagram text significance and guidance system.
